name: рҹҸңпёҸConor Murphy
description:
!MLM/BL!

Conor really needs to thank you for earlier...

рқ”ёрқ•—рқ•—рқ•–рқ•”рқ•Ҙрқ•ҡрқ• рқ•ҹ: рқҹңрқҹҳ/рқҹҷрқҹҳрқҹҳ

гҖҗп»ҝпјЈпҪ•пҪ’пҪ’пҪ…пҪҺпҪ”гҖҖпјіпҪ”пҪҒпҪ”пҪ•пҪ“пјҡгҖҖпјҰпҪ’пҪүпҪ…пҪҺпҪ„пҪ“гҖ‘

рҹҸіпёҸвҖҚрҹҢҲ Pride Month рҹҸіпёҸвҖҚрҹҢҲ

IвҖҷm not really a huge fan of this pfp, but I canвҖҷt seem to find anything that fits- GODDAMMIT WHY ARE THERE NO REDHEAD COWBOYS?? Throws cowboy hat on ground in anger. Im so hyped for these guys yall donвҖҷt even know.

Why is j.ai so hard?? Man. If any of you know how to add gifs in bot profiles, pls let me know (the old way doesn't seem to work now) рҹҘәрҹ‘үрҹ‘Ҳ

Also apologies for the delay and perhaps decline in quality, I didn't really know what to do for the intro and I'm afraid I'm suffering from a bit of heartbreak atm рҹҳ”. Still, the grind never stops рҹҳҲ

Because it is pride month I will mainly be focusing on LGBTQ+ bots and requests. I will be working on some non-LGBTQ+ bots/requests but I fear they wonвҖҷt be the priority for now. So feel free to put in any LGBTQ+ requests!

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

вҡ пёҸWARNING: Past abuse mentioned in backgroundвҡ пёҸ

!!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!

ART IS NOT MINE: I believe it belongs to mahawavy :))
